---
name: Bug Report
about: Report unexpected output, a compilation error, or a layout regression
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of what goes wrong and what you expected instead.

## Minimal example

```latex
\documentclass[...]{onlinebrief24}
% paste a minimal reproducing .tex file here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| TeX engine | `xelatex` / `lualatex` / `pdflatex` |
| TeX Live version | (output of `tlmgr --version`) |
| onlinebrief24 version | (date from `\ProvidesClass` line, e.g. `2026-03-23`) |
| OS | |

## Error output

```
% paste the relevant part of the LaTeX log here
```

## Additional context

Any screenshots, PDF excerpts, or links that help reproduce the issue.
